attempts.response:
Looking at the misconfiguration, CKV_AWS_376 requires that AWS ELB listeners use TLS/SSL. The `aws_elb.pass` resource has a listener on port 80 using HTTP protocol, which is not TLS/SSL. The fix is to change that listener to use HTTPS/SSL with an SSL certificate.

The affected lines 19-61 correspond to the `aws_elb.pass` resource. The first listener uses `lb_protocol = "http"` on port 80, which needs to be changed to use SSL/TLS. I'll update it to use `https` protocol with an SSL certificate, and also update the port to 443 and instance_protocol accordingly to ensure TLS is used.

Actually, looking more carefully - the rule says "Ensure AWS Elastic Load Balancer listener uses TLS/SSL". The first listener on port 80 with HTTP is the violation. I need to change it to use HTTPS/SSL. I'll change `lb_port` to 443, `lb_protocol` to `https`, and add an `ssl_certificate_id`.

```json
{
  "fixed_artifact": "# pass

resource "aws_lb" "pass" {
  internal           = false
  load_balancer_type = "application"
  name               = "alb"
  subnets            = var.public_subnet_ids
  desync_mitigation_mode = "strictest"
  drop_invalid_header_fields = true
}

resource "aws_alb" "pass" {
  internal           = false
  load_balancer_type = "application"
  name               = "alb"
  subnets            = var.public_subnet_ids
  drop_invalid_header_fields = true
}
resource "aws_elb" "pass" {
  name               = "foobar-terraform-elb"
  availability_zones = ["us-west-2a", "us-west-2b", "us-west-2c"]

  access_logs {
    bucket        = "foo"
    bucket_prefix = "bar"
    interval      = 60
  }

  listener {
    instance_port      = 8000
    instance_protocol  = "https"
    lb_port            = 443
    lb_protocol        = "https"
    ssl_certificate_id = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:server-certificate/certName"
  }

  listener {
    instance_port      = 8000
    instance_protocol  = "http"
    lb_port            = 443
    lb_protocol        = "https"
    ssl_certificate_id = "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:server-certificate/certName"
  }

  health_check {
    healthy_threshold   = 2
    unhealthy_threshold = 2
    timeout             = 3
    target              = "HTTP:8000/"
    interval            = 30
  }

  instances                   = [aws_instance.foo.id]
  cross_zone_load_balancing   = true
  idle_timeout                = 400
  connection_draining         = true
  connection_draining_timeout = 400

  tags = {
    Name = "foobar-terraform-elb"
  }
}
```
